events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Sending good vibes to Ringo Starr on his birthday. What's your favourite Fab Four track featuring his unmistakable drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May! His guitar work with Queen is simply out of this world. What's your go-to Brian May solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem that gets you moving?

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV burst onto screens, forever changing music and pop culture. And it all started with 'Video Killed The Radio Star.' What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: 32 years of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking 32 years since its impact.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's the track from that album that still gives you chills?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Which legendary performance from '69 still resonates with you?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, the music world fell silent as we said goodbye to Elvis Presley. His legacy as 'The King' lives on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Three decades ago, we lost a lyrical genius. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on music and culture. What's his most powerful track for you?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Hendrix Lives On
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost a true pioneer. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, whose groundbreaking guitar work continues to inspire. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: 57 years of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on September 26, 1969, featuring that unforgettable zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Abbey Road
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. From 'Come Together' to the legendary medley, it's a masterpiece. What's your standout track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Hynde's High Notes
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude with The Pretenders are truly timeless. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad for it, Liam!
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Whether it's Oasis, Beady Eye, or solo, his voice is unmistakable. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' (1975 UK Single context)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in 1975, following its original 1971 album release, becoming a powerful message of peace.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' resonated across the UK as a single. Its message of peace and unity is as vital today as it was then. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced the iPod, changing the game for music lovers everywhere. Remember that click wheel? What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic themes to unforgettable gadgets, 007 has it all. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's your top Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon song?
